channel.title: Zachary Vorsteg
channel.description: Insights on finance, real estate, automation, and building.

item.title: Agentic Engineering: What Replaced Vibe Coding
item.description: Karpathy coined agentic engineering as vibe coding's professional counterpart. Here's the methodology — task decomposition, review gates, and real walkthroughs.

item.title: Context Engineering for AI Agents: What I Actually Configure
item.description: My CLAUDE.md is 500+ lines. Here's what context engineering for AI agents looks like in production — hooks, MCP routing, memory — not just prompt engineering.

item.title: How I Use Agentic AI to Run a One-Person Company
item.description: I manage CRE deals, dozens of trading strategies, IoT hardware, and iOS apps — alone. Here's what agentic AI actually does in my daily workflow, not what it could.

item.title: Shipping IoT Hardware Solo: ESP32 Prototype to Deployment
item.description: I built an IoT thermal detection system using ESP32-S3, MLX90640 sensors, and cellular backhaul — solo, with no hardware background. Here's the full journey.

item.title: Vibe Coding vs Real Engineering: Where I Draw the Line
item.description: I use AI to write code daily and run production trading bots handling real money. Here's where vibe coding works, where it breaks, and why the debate misses the point.

item.title: What Breaks When You Automate Everything as a Solo Founder
item.description: I run a fleet of automated trading systems, IoT hardware, and an iOS app — all solo. Here's what actually breaks, how failures cascade, and what I've learned you can't automate.

item.title: How I Built 54 Trading Bots as a Side Project
item.description: I run 54 trading bots across 5 markets. Here's what 3 years taught me about strategy decay, slippage, correlated drawdowns, and what actually breaks.

item.title: How I Build in Public as a Technical Founder
item.description: I run a multi-market trading infrastructure, ship iOS apps, and build IoT hardware — all solo. Here's what I share, what I keep private, and why transparency compounds.

item.title: Solo Founder Automation Stack: 54 Python Bots
item.description: I run 54 automated bots on a single Mac using Python and launchctl — for $8/month. Full architecture, real failures, and cost analysis vs. cloud.

item.title: Why I'm a Commercial Real Estate Sales Associate Who Codes
item.description: I'm a licensed CRE sales associate who also runs production trading infrastructure and ships software. Here's why commercial real estate's tech gap is my biggest competitive advantage.

item.title: Financial Modeling Fundamentals for M&A
item.description: DCF, LBO, and merger models explained — the three financial models that drive every M&A valuation, with synergy frameworks and sensitivity analysis.
